metadata.name: kube-vip DaemonSet
metadata.description: Practical kube-vip DaemonSet bootstrap with RBAC for control-plane virtual IPs and optional Service LoadBalancer handling in bare-metal clusters.

items.name: namespace
items.title: Namespace
items.description: Namespace where kube-vip should run.

items.name: service_account_name
items.title: Service account
items.description: Service account name used by the kube-vip DaemonSet.

items.name: daemonset_name
items.title: DaemonSet name
items.description: Name of the kube-vip DaemonSet.

items.name: image
items.title: Image
items.description: Container image for kube-vip.

items.name: interface
items.title: Primary interface
items.description: Host interface used by kube-vip for ARP announcements and VIP binding.

items.name: services_interface_enabled
items.title: Services interface
items.description: Use a separate interface for Service LoadBalancer announcements.

items.name: services_interface
items.title: Services interface name
items.description: Interface used for service advertisements when a dedicated interface is required.

items.name: vip_address
items.title: Control-plane VIP
items.description: Virtual IP for the Kubernetes API when control-plane mode is enabled.

items.name: vip_subnet
items.title: VIP subnet mask
items.description: Subnet mask used for the advertised VIP.

items.name: control_plane_port
items.title: API port
items.description: Kubernetes API port exposed by the control-plane VIP.

items.name: control_plane_enabled
items.title: Control-plane VIP
items.description: Advertise a floating VIP for the Kubernetes API.

items.name: services_enabled
items.title: Service LoadBalancer
items.description: Watch and advertise Kubernetes Services of type LoadBalancer.

items.name: service_election_enabled
items.title: Per-service election
items.description: Use a separate leader election for each service when service mode is enabled.

items.name: leader_election_enabled
items.title: Leader election
items.description: Enable kube-vip leader election for ARP mode.

items.name: watch_services_namespace_enabled
items.title: Watch one namespace
items.description: Restrict service mode to a specific namespace instead of the whole cluster.

items.name: watch_services_namespace
items.title: Watched namespace
items.description: Namespace watched by kube-vip when scoped service mode is enabled.

items.name: lease_duration
items.title: Lease duration
items.description: Lease duration in seconds for leader election.

items.name: renew_deadline
items.title: Renew deadline
items.description: Renew deadline in seconds for leader election.

items.name: retry_period
items.title: Retry period
items.description: Retry period in seconds for leader election.

items.name: control_plane_only
items.title: Control-plane nodes only
items.description: Schedule kube-vip only on nodes labeled as control-plane or master.
